'''鈭歮-sh-l''' ('''mashala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quitter|quitter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-sh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quitter|quitter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-sh-l
|-
! Lemma
| mashala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mashalithi|mashalithi]] || [[word:mashaliji|mashaliji]] || [[word:mashalishi|mashalishi]] || [[word:mashali|mashali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mashaluthuth|mashaluthuth]] || [[word:mashalujuj|mashalujuj]] || [[word:mashalushush|mashalushush]] || [[word:mashal|mashal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mashaluthu|mashaluthu]] || [[word:mashaluju|mashaluju]] || [[word:mashalushu|mashalushu]] || [[word:mashalu|mashalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mashalufuth|mashalufuth]] || [[word:mashalufuj|mashalufuj]] || [[word:mashalufush|mashalufush]] || [[word:mashaluf|mashaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mashalethe|mashalethe]] || [[word:mashaleje|mashaleje]] || [[word:mashaleshe|mashaleshe]] || [[word:mashale|mashale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mashalothoth|mashalothoth]] || [[word:mashalojoj|mashalojoj]] || [[word:mashaloshosh|mashaloshosh]] || [[word:mashal|mashal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mashalotho|mashalotho]] || [[word:mashalojo|mashalojo]] || [[word:mashalosho|mashalosho]] || [[word:mashalo|mashalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mashalofoth|mashalofoth]] || [[word:mashalofoj|mashalofoj]] || [[word:mashalofosh|mashalofosh]] || [[word:mashalof|mashalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mashal忙th忙|mashal忙th忙]] || [[word:mashal忙j忙|mashal忙j忙]] || [[word:mashal忙sh忙|mashal忙sh忙]] || [[word:mashal忙|mashal忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mashalathath|mashalathath]] || [[word:mashalajaj|mashalajaj]] || [[word:mashalashash|mashalashash]] || [[word:mashal|mashal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mashalatha|mashalatha]] || [[word:mashalaja|mashalaja]] || [[word:mashalasha|mashalasha]] || [[word:mashala|mashala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mashalafath|mashalafath]] || [[word:mashalafaj|mashalafaj]] || [[word:mashalafash|mashalafash]] || [[word:mashalaf|mashalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:mashalasha|mashalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomashalasha|gomashalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimashalasha|gokimashalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:mashaln眉sha|mashaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomashalnkn眉sha|gomashalnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimashaln眉sha|gokimashaln眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mashalsh毛sha|mashalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomashalnksh毛sha|gomashalnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimashalsh毛sha|gokimashalsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mashalrosha|mashalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomashalnkrosha|gomashalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimashalrosha|gokimashalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mashalmusha|mashalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomashalnkmusha|gomashalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimashalmusha|gokimashalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:mashalsherasha|mashalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomashalnksherasha|gomashalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimashalsherasha|gokimashalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:mashalngasha|mashalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomashalnkngasha|gomashalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimashalngasha|gokimashalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mashalyasha|mashalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomashalnkyasha|gomashalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimashalyasha|gokimashalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:mashalyamasha|mashalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomashalnkyamasha|gomashalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimashalyamasha|gokimashalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:mashaln眉sh毛sha|mashaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomashalnkn眉sh毛sha|gomashalnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimashaln眉sh毛sha|gokimashaln眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mashaln眉rosha|mashaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomashalnkn眉rosha|gomashalnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimashaln眉rosha|gokimashaln眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mashaln眉musha|mashaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomashalnkn眉musha|gomashalnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimashaln眉musha|gokimashaln眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:mashalsh毛n眉sha|mashalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomashalnksh毛n眉sha|gomashalnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimashalsh毛n眉sha|gokimashalsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mashalsh毛rosha|mashalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomashalnksh毛rosha|gomashalnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimashalsh毛rosha|gokimashalsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mashalsh毛musha|mashalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomashalnksh毛musha|gomashalnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimashalsh毛musha|gokimashalsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:mashalron眉sha|mashalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomashalnkron眉sha|gomashalnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimashalron眉sha|gokimashalron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:mashalrosh毛sha|mashalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomashalnkrosh毛sha|gomashalnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimashalrosh毛sha|gokimashalrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mashalromusha|mashalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomashalnkromusha|gomashalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimashalromusha|gokimashalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:mashalmun眉sha|mashalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomashalnkmun眉sha|gomashalnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimashalmun眉sha|gokimashalmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:mashalmush毛sha|mashalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomashalnkmush毛sha|gomashalnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimashalmush毛sha|gokimashalmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mashalmurosha|mashalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomashalnkmurosha|gomashalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimashalmurosha|gokimashalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:mashal|mashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:m忙sh忙l|m忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homashal|homashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hom忙sh忙l|hom忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomashal|hohomashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohom忙sh忙l|hohom忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉mashal|n眉mashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉m忙sh忙l|n眉m忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉mashal|n眉n眉mashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉m忙sh忙l|n眉n眉m忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂mashal|n茂mashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂m忙sh忙l|n茂m忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂mashal|n茂n茂mashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂m忙sh忙l|n茂n茂m忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumashal|lumashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lum忙sh忙l|lum忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumashal|lulumashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulum忙sh忙l|lulum忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limashal|limashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lim忙sh忙l|lim忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimashal|lilimashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilim忙sh忙l|lilim忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komashal|komashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kom忙sh忙l|kom忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomashal|kokomashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokom忙sh忙l|kokom忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemashal|kemashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kem忙sh忙l|kem忙sh忙l]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemashal|kekemashal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekem忙sh忙l|kekem忙sh忙l]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
